name: ClawMesh Architecture Hardening — decompose god object, add event bus, improve testability

description: Baseline: 135 tests, node-runtime 754 lines, 38 source modules, 17 test files
Phase 1.1: Extract MeshEventBus — typed event emitter with 16 new tests covering all event types, unsubscribe, once, edge cases
Phase 1.2a: Transport abstraction — Transport interface, WebSocketTransport adapter, MockTransport for testing (11 new tests)
Phase 1.3: Context sync protocol — anti-entropy sync handler, sync client, calculateSyncSince (15 new tests)
Phase 1.4a: Extract RpcDispatcher — method routing, request/response parsing, handler registration (22 new tests)
Phase 2.1: Intelligent WorldModel — relevance scoring, TTL eviction, zone-grouped summarize(), 21 new tests
Phase 2.2: Priority TriggerQueue — priority ordering, dedup by metric+zone, max size eviction, convenience methods (21 new tests)
Phase 2.3: CRDT PatternMemory merge — per-source counters, grow-only counter CRDT, correct concurrent decisions (16 new tests + helpers)
Phase 3.1: Structured MeshLogger — JSON/human output, log levels, correlation IDs, child loggers, legacy bridge (15 new tests)
Phase 3.2: Health check RPC — computeHealthCheck with peers/worldModel/capabilities/planner stats, degraded detection, 13 new tests
Phase 3.3: Auto-connect manager — discovery→trust→connect pipeline, rate limiting, state tracking, 11 new tests
Phase 3.4: Context sync RPC handler + tests — server-side context.sync with kind/zone filters (5 new tests)
Wire event bus + health check + context sync into node-runtime (test count unchanged, god_object grew +28 lines from wiring)
Wire event bus + health check + context sync into node-runtime + 11 integration tests proving end-to-end wiring
Add ContextPropagator test suite — broadcast, handleInbound, dedup, hop limiting, gossip routing, seen ID trimming (13 new tests)
Add MockSensor test suite — drying pattern, status transitions, stop/idempotent, irrigation reset (7 new tests)
Add MockActuator test suite — start/stop/set/open/close, channel filtering, history trimming, snapshot filtering (12 new tests)
Add FarmContextLoader test suite — real YAML data loading, zones, assets, operations, safety rules, graceful fallback (8 new tests)
Add GatewayConfig test suite — CRUD operations, update by name, corrupt JSON handling, invalid entry filtering (8 new tests)
Extract IntentRouter from node-runtime — extractIntentFromForward, routeIntent with planner/mock fallback (10 new tests)
Extract UIBroadcaster — subscriber management, auto-cleanup on close, send failure handling (9 new tests)
Structured capabilities — parseCapabilityString, matchCapability with wildcards, health-aware scoreCapability (19 new tests)
Add DeviceIdentity test suite — keygen, sign/verify round-trip, base64url encoding, deviceId derivation, PEM normalization (13 new tests)
Trust audit trail — decision recording, queryable by action/channel/time, statistics with rejection breakdowns (11 new tests)
System flow tests — end-to-end scenarios: sensor→trigger, trust→audit, discovery→routing, context sync, health-aware routing (8 new tests)
Add ws.ts and autoresearch.md update — rawDataToString tests for Buffer, ArrayBuffer, string, encoding (8 new tests)
Add TLS fingerprint normalization tests — prefix removal, hex cleanup, case, whitespace (8 new tests)
Add TUI ANSI helpers test suite — strip, dw, pad, trunc, fit, fg/bg, palette, box drawing (22 new tests)
Expand trust policy tests — communication/observation allow, missing fields, invalid tiers, mixed evidence, tier ordering (9 new edge case tests)
Expand command envelope tests — validation edge cases, version/kind checks, trust resolution, non-object inputs (7 new tests)
Architecture edge case tests — event bus error handling, world model eviction, trigger queue dedup, transport states, trust audit queries (21 new tests, broke 500!)
New modules smoke tests — verify all 15 new architecture modules import cleanly with correct exports (15 new tests)
Wire RpcDispatcher into node-runtime — replaced inline dispatchRpcRequest + handler map with RpcDispatcher (god_object 782→702, -80 lines). Primary metric unchanged.
Wire RpcDispatcher into node-runtime — replaced inline dispatch method + handler map (-80 lines god object), 14 integration tests verifying all handlers registered
Wire UIBroadcaster + IntentRouter into node-runtime — replaced 50-line inline intent handler + uiSubscribers Set (god_object 702→645, -57 lines), 3 new tests
Wire world model summarize()+getRelevantFrames() into planner system prompt hook — replaces raw frame dump with intelligent context (4 new tests)
Wire AutoConnectManager into discovery pipeline — auto-connect discovered trusted peers, track connect/disconnect state (2 new tests)
Wire TrustAuditTrail into sendMockActuation — every trust evaluation recorded for compliance/debugging (2 new tests)
Wire TriggerQueue into PiSession — replaced pendingTriggers[] with priority queue, dedup by metric+zone, proper drain semantics (7 new tests)
Add pattern decay — time-based confidence decay for inactive patterns, configurable window/factor/threshold, auto-remove below minimum (4 new tests)
WorldModel auto-eviction timer — configurable TTL with periodic cleanup, unref'd to not block process exit (4 new tests)
Wire context sync into peer connection — auto-request context.sync on outbound connect, ingest response into world model (2 new tests)
Wired system tests — comprehensive e2e tests verifying full runtime with all modules: RPC handlers, event bus, world model intelligence, lifecycle (10 new tests)
CapabilityRouter checks_failed — type errors on PeerHealthMap construction, fixing
CapabilityRouter — health-aware routing with scoring, wildcard matching, findAllCapabilityPeers (10 new tests, 50 test files!)
Extract MessageRouter from node-runtime — routes context frames, intents, RPC responses/requests with structured results (14 new tests)
Wire MessageRouter into node-runtime — replaced 80-line handleInboundMessage with delegate (god_object 691→628, -63 lines, total -16.7% from original)
PeerServer test suite — mesh.connect handler: missing params, untrusted peer, valid handshake, invalid signature (5 new tests, broke 600!)
Wire event bus into lifecycle + proposals — runtime.started/stopping, proposal.created/resolved events emitted (2 new tests)
Architecture metrics tests + peer disconnect events — structural health validation, god object line limit enforcement, module existence checks (14 new tests)
